title: UN nuclear chief says inspectors will visit Iran sites as part of war deal
summary_full: Rafael Grossi says the IAEA is "working on modalities" but an Iranian  minister says such access would only be part of a final deal with the US.
summary_public: Rafael Grossi says the IAEA is "working on modalities" but an Iranian  minister says such access would only be part of a final deal with the US.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: UN nuclear chief says inspectors will visit Iran sites
